events.text: Penalty saved! Lionel Messi (Argentina) fails to capitalise on this great opportunity,  left footed shot saved  in the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Poland 0, Argentina 1. Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nahuel Molina with a cross.
Marcos Acuña (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Poland 0, Argentina 2. Julián Álvarez (Argentina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Enzo Fernández.
Grzegorz Krychowiak (Poland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
